This project is a Python GUI implementation of a random number generator using Tkinter. The initial version will allow users to specify a range and generate random numbers with a mouse click.

## Execution Guidelines
- Use the RNGeneratorGUI subfolder as the project root.

=======
This project is a Python GUI implementation of the classic Tic Tac Toe game using Tkinter. The initial version will be a mouse-driven game, organized for easy extension (e.g., adding AI or improving GUI).

## Execution Guidelines
- Use the TicTacToeGUI subfolder as the project root.

- Only install extensions specified by project setup info.
- Mark each checklist item as completed after finishing the step.
